metadata.title:
CHICAGO CAPITAL IS IN


IDAHO WATER SCHEME

pages.raw_text:
Registered at the Hotel Spokane is
party OF 10 Chicago capitalists in
terested in Senator Fred Du Bots ir-
rigation scheme--known as the Lew
iston- Waha Land, Water & Power
company. They arrived in town this
morning and leave for Lewiston to-
morrow. where they will spend a
week examining the $4,000 acres Of
land through which, the proposed ca
nal and irrigation bitches are to be
run.


Interested in the undertaking with
Mr.. Du Bots IL ]. G. Trainer. a pro-
moter and capitalist OF Chicago. who
10 In charge Of the party consisting
Of the following gentlemen: c. F.
Thomson, plano manufacturer; j.
Milton Trainer. building contractor;
Sidney Adler. attorney; E. F. Dunn,
